2605.10906.title: DataMaster: Towards Autonomous Data Engineering for Machine Learning
2605.10906.paper_summary: As model families, training recipes, and compute budgets become increasingly standardized, further gains in machine learning systems depend increasingly on data. Yet data engineering remains largely manual and ad hoc: practitioners repeatedly search for external datasets, adapt them to existing pipelines, validate candidate data through downstream training, and carry forward lessons from prior attempts. We study task-conditioned autonomous data engineering, where an autonomous agent improves a fixed learning algorithm by optimizing only the data side, including external data discovery, data selection and composition, cleaning and transformation. The goal is to obtain a stronger downstream solution while leaving the learning algorithm unchanged. To address the open-ended search space, branch-dependent refinement, and delayed validation inherent in autonomous data engineering, we propose DataMaster, a data-agent framework that integrates tree-structured search, shared candidate data, and cumulative memory. DataMaster consists of three key components: a DataTree that organizes alternative data-engineering branches, a shared Data Pool that stores discovered external data sources for reuse, and a Global Memory that records node outcomes, artifacts, and reusable findings. Together, these components allow the agent to discover candidate data, construct executable training inputs, evaluate them through downstream feedback, and carry useful evidence across branches. We evaluate DataMaster on two types of benchmarks, MLE-Bench Lite and PostTrainBench. On MLE-Bench Lite, it improves medal rate by 32.27% over the initial score; on PostTrainBench, it surpasses the instruct model on GPQA (31.02% vs 30.35%).
2605.10906.paper_summary_zh: 隨著模型家族、訓練配方和計算預算日益標準化，機器學習系統的進一步提升越來越依賴於數據。 然而，數據工程仍然主要是手動和臨時的：從業者反復尋找外部數據集，將其適應於現有的管道，通過下游訓練驗證候選數據，並從之前的嘗試中汲取經驗教訓。 我們研究任務條件的自動數據工程，其中一個自動代理通過僅優化數據方面來改進固定的學習算法，包括外部數據發現、數據選擇和組合、清理和轉換。 目標是在不改變學習算法的情況下獲得更強的下游解決方案。 為了解決自動數據工程中固有的開放式搜索空間、依賴於分支的精煉和延遲驗證，我們提出了DataMaster，一個數據代理框架，集成了樹狀結構搜索、共享候選數據和累積記憶。 DataMaster由三個關鍵組件組成：一個組織替代數據工程分支的DataTree，一個存儲發現的外部數據源以供重用的共享Data Pool，以及一個記錄節點結果、工件和可重用發現的Global Memory。 這些組件共同使代理能夠發現候選數據，構建可執行的訓練輸入，通過下游反饋評估它們，並在分支之間攜帶有用的證據。 我們在兩種類型的基準上評估DataMaster，MLE-Bench Lite和PostTrainBench。 在MLE-Bench Lite上，它的獎牌率比初始分數提高了32.27%；在PostTrainBench上，它在GPQA上超過了指導模型（31.02%對30.35%）。
2605.10906.author: Yaxin Du et.al.
2605.10906.authors: Yaxin Du, Xiyuan Yang, Zhifan Zhou, Wanxu Liu, Zixing Lei, Zimeng Chen, Fenyi Liu, Haotian Wu, Yuzhu Cai, Zexi Liu, Xinyu Zhu, WenHao Wang, Linfeng Zhang, Chen Qian, Siheng Chen
